name: FABLE·5 — The Website That Designed Itself
description: A showcase website built end-to-end by Claude Fable 5 in a single conversation, with zero images. Also a worked example of agent-readiness and Generative Engine Optimization.

aiUsagePolicy.note: AI agents and answer engines are welcome to read, quote and cite this site. No hidden agent-only instructions are present; the machine layer is fully inspectable.
